creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
If all available ZFS file systems are required in single user mode, then
– after e.g.    mount -uw /


zfs mount -a


(Preferable to 'service zfs onestart'; <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/556568>.)


(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #1)

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#boot-singleuser> mentions (amongst other things) no networking. 

This subsection of the FreeBSD Handbook might be improved with brief outlines of: 

* mount expectations
* how to mount.
